title: Mushroom Survival House
description: Adds a small simple Mushroom House to the game, perfect for the start of the game
body:
This Mod adds a small simple Mushroom House to the game, perfect for the start of the game to stay stay in for the first nights so that you are safe from the monsters or a great start to build your base at.

![Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94e55b80abc234aa0917bde06bbc715f62384b63_0.webp)
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79cd2566df2fe12f910e6cab8d576e872b09a176_0.webp)

Inside the barrels you will find some simple small Mushroom related loot, helping you a bit at the start off the game.

you can find the structure in Mushroom fields and dark forest biomes and also rarly in the normal plains biome.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
